content:
Length?
Tone? I don’t think it should necessarily be one thing. While I want it to be funny, and also dramatic—I don’t want it to be silly or melodramatic.

Elements of Truman Show, LOST, faux reality tv (real world, the bachelor, naked and afraid) with interview portions and other reality tv tropes

Like I said, what I’m presenting is the world in which the drama and comedy will exist. So the show itself still needs a ton of building. If you are interested in this project, let me know and I will create a timeline in which we will meet. A good amount of us usually do a film Sunday nights, so I’m thinking pre film we can host this meeting (but that is open to debate). The first meeting will happen this Sunday.

aaron, daniel, mary, nick, chris, madison, adam
context: From document: FAU MFA Writer’s Room — chunk 5 (chunk 5/5)
